india_trends.title: Marico Q4 results: Net profit rises 14% YoY to ₹391 crore, ₹4 per share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Marico Q4 results: Net profit rises 14% YoY to ₹391 crore, ₹4 per share dividend announced. The stock opened at ₹789.05 apiece today, as compared to previous close of ₹784.55 on Monday.

india_trends.title: Why investors are cautious despite Ather’s revenue surge
india_trends.summary: While a massive revenue jump and narrowed losses signal operating leverage, rising cell costs and a steep valuation are keeping market enthusiasm in check.

india_trends.title: USD vs INR: Indian Rupee may depreciate to 96 per US dollar amid rising crude oil prices, global risk
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee fell 20 paise to 95.43 against the US dollar amid geopolitical tensions and rising Brent crude prices, impacting oil-importing nations. Experts warn that prolonged currency weakness could worsen India's current account deficit and trigger further capital outflows.

india_trends.summary: Geopolitical tensions in West Asia are impacting India's economy, leading UBS Securities to lower its GDP growth forecast to 6.2% and revise inflation estimates upward. india_trends.summary: Mutual funds increased exposure to 82 midcap stocks in the March 2026 quarter, signalling strong conviction. india_trends.title: PNB Q4 results: Profit up 14.4% to ₹5,225 crore; NII, NIM drop on a YoY basis
india_trends.summary: PNB Q4 results: PNB's Q4 profit saw a 14.41% YoY rise. However, NII and NIM declined on a year-over-year basis. Operating profit rose by 10.7% YoY.

india_trends.title: Reliance Industries to shut crude unit at 660,000 bpd refinery for maintenance, sources say
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries will shut a crude unit and secondary units at its 660,000 barrels per day refinery for three to four weeks. india_trends.title: US 30-Year Yield Hits 5% on Oil Surge, Higher Borrowing Outlook
india_trends.summary: Treasuries fell, sending 30-year yields to the highest since July, as a surge in oil prices stoked inflation fears while higher government borrowing estimates fueled concerns about increased supply.
